decks.notes: This Izzet Control deck focuses on disrupting and controlling the opponent's game plan through a combination of counter spells, removal, and card advantage. It leverages cards like Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock to delay opponents while generating value with cards like Opt and Prismari Charm. The deck aims to outlast opponents through card advantage and efficient removal spells, eventually winning the game through a mix of direct damage and control. The mix of creatures, counter spells, and removal provides the deck with flexibility to adapt to various matchups and strategies.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counter spells while also using the powerful effects of "Gran-Gran" and "Tablet of Discovery" to generate card advantage. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent with cards like "Jeskai Revelation" and "Iroh's Demonstration", while also utilizing cards like "Combustion Technique" and "Firebending Lesson" for removal and board control. The mana base is optimized to support the deck's color requirements and ensure smooth gameplay.

This deck focuses on aggressive creatures with flying abilities, backed by support spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, the deck aims to deal damage swiftly and efficiently. Starfield Shepherd and Quantum Riddler provide additional value and disruption to the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of Springleaf Drum and Multiversal Passage aids in mana acceleration and fixing. Overall, the deck aims to establish early board presence and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The deck focuses on controlling the board with disruptive spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics while utilizing creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Elusive Otter to apply consistent pressure on the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Secret Identity and Into the Flood Maw allows for surprise plays and extra card advantage. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggression and trickery, utilizing the UR color combination's versatile spell options to create advantageous board states and close out games efficiently.

The main concept of this Dimir control deck is to maintain board control and disrupt the opponent's strategy through a combination of removal spells and counterspells. The deck focuses on using powerful creatures like Emeritus of Ideation and Oildeep Gearhulk to control the battlefield, while also utilizing spells like Deceit and Shoot the Sheriff to deal with threats. Additionally, cards like Requiting Hex and Day of Black Sun provide added utility and disruption. The mana base includes various lands to support the deck's color requirements and provide flexibility in casting spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing cheap and efficient spells to control the board while quickly building up a threatening board presence with evasive creatures. By combining aggressive creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Colorstorm Stallion with cheap interactive spells like Burst Lightning and Spell Pierce, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain control of the game. Additionally, cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand help to dig for key pieces of the deck, while cards like Boomerang Basics and Impractical Joke provide additional tempo advantage.

The deck focuses on quickly establishing board presence and pressuring the opponent with cheap and evasive creatures, backed up by instant speed removal and card draw. By efficiently managing resources and maintaining tempo, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. Key cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Boomerang Basics help maintain a proactive game plan, while cards like Burst Lightning and Secret Identity offer flexibility in dealing with threats. The deck's mana base is designed to support a consistent and aggressive game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back into play using reanimation cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man. By combining different abilities and effects, such as Doomsday Excruciator and Emeritus of Ideation, the deck creates a powerful synergistic combo that can overwhelm opponents. The deck also includes cards that provide disruption and protection, such as Duress and Deadly Cover-Up, to help ensure the combo goes off smoothly. Additionally, the lands in the deck are carefully chosen to support the strategy and maximize its potential.

This deck focuses on maintaining control over the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, counterspells, and board wipes. It aims to outvalue the opponent by generating card advantage, denying their resources, and disrupting their game plan. By efficiently answering threats and drawing into powerful spells like Jeskai Revelation, the deck can take over the game and secure victory. The mana base is well-balanced and enables the deck to cast its spells consistently while also providing access to different colors of mana for versatility.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay by using a combination of low-cost creatures and disruptive spells to control the board and pressure the opponent. The strategy is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient creatures while disrupting their plans with spells like Spell Pierce. The deck also includes some card draw and card advantage options to maintain momentum throughout the game. There is a mix of creature types with a focus on Dimir colors for a strategic mix of aggression and control.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm and outpace your opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. By using cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Sleight of Hand, you can efficiently control the battlefield while building up your board presence with creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Drake Hatcher. The deck also incorporates ways to draw cards and search for key pieces, ensuring consistency in your strategy. With a combination of tempo control and powerful threats, this UR Aggro deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize.

The key concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence and apply pressure to the opponent by playing low-cost creatures and spells, while utilizing card draw and versatile removal to maintain momentum. The deck focuses on tempo, aggression, and efficiency, with the potential to quickly end the game through burst damage. Additionally, the deck includes a mix of evasion and disruptive elements to outmaneuver opponents and disrupt their game plan. Finally, the mana base is designed to provide consistent access to the deck's key colors.

The main concept of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to swarm the board with low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, while using cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Sazh's Chocobo to pump them up and overwhelm the opponent quickly. The deck also utilizes cards like Earthbender Ascension and Royal Treatment to provide additional support and removal options. With a focus on aggression and quick damage output, this deck aims to dominate the battlefield and end the game swiftly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on building a strong board presence quickly with low-cost creatures and ramp spells, allowing for early aggression and efficient mana usage. The deck also includes cards that provide card advantage and protection for your creatures, ensuring that you can maintain pressure on your opponent and dictate the pace of the game. With a mix of creature synergy, mana acceleration, and card draw, this Mono Green Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize and turn the game in your favor.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, while also using cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension to pump up your creatures and overwhelm your opponent. The deck also includes spells like Erode and Demolition Field to deal with opposing threats, as well as mana-fixing cards like Fabled Passage and Ba Sing Se to ensure consistent access to all of your colors. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain tempo throughout the game.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Combo - Reanimator archetype to quickly and efficiently bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard to the battlefield. This is achieved through cards like Deceit, Superior Spider-Man, and Doomsday Excruciator, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Duress and Shoot the Sheriff. The deck also includes cards like Winternight Stories and Bitter Triumph to provide additional value and options for different game states. Overall, this deck focuses on maximizing the potential of graveyard interaction and combo potential to overwhelm the opponent.
